case_title: IN RE: SOU POU SAE CHAO

documents.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME COURT ORDERED NAME CHANGED TO MATTHEW SAECHAO FILED BY PETITIONER SAE CHAO, SOU POU

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Name Change. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the Court changed Petitioner's name to Matthew Saechao. Order signed in open court.
